description: Detects weak randomness in C++: rand()/srand() in security contexts, timing side-channel via memcmp/strcmp on sensitive data. Simplified from Rust per D-07: flags all call_expression nodes (cannot check enclosing function name or argument content for security keywords without cross-node analysis).

flag.message: Function call detected -- verify rand(), srand() are not used in security contexts (tokens, keys, nonces); use std::random_device or OS CSPRNG instead. Verify memcmp/strcmp are not used for timing-sensitive comparisons on secrets.
